004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.response;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.net.*;
022import java.util.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.http.entity.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.http.header.*;
027
028/**
029 * Base class for concrete HTTP response objects in the {@code org.apache.juneau.http} stack.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * Holds a status line, an optional body, and an ordered list of headers. Provides classic-style
033 * fluent setters that mutate state and return {@code this}, plus an {@link #setUnmodifiable()} latch
034 * that locks the instance against further changes.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
038 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
039 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
040 * (and possibly earlier).
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
044 * </ul>
045 *
046 * @since 9.2.1
047 */
048public class BasicHttpResponse implements HttpResponseMessage {
049
050   private HttpStatusLine statusLine;
051   private final HttpHeaderList headers;
052   private HttpBody body;
053   private Locale locale;
054   private boolean unmodifiable;
055
056   /**
057    * Constructor with no body.
058    *
059    * @param statusLine The status line. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
060    */
061   public BasicHttpResponse(HttpStatusLine statusLine) {
062      this(statusLine, List.of(), StringBody.of(statusLine.getReasonPhrase()));
063   }
064
065   /**
066    * Constructor with a body.
067    *
068    * @param statusLine The status line. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
069    * @param body The response body. May be <jk>null</jk>.
070    */
071   public BasicHttpResponse(HttpStatusLine statusLine, HttpBody body) {
072      this(statusLine, List.of(), body);
073   }
074
075   /**
076    * Constructor with a string body (UTF-8, {@code text/plain}).
077    *
078    * @param statusLine The status line. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
079    * @param body The response body as a plain-text string. May be <jk>null</jk>.
080    */
081   public BasicHttpResponse(HttpStatusLine statusLine, String body) {
082      this(statusLine, List.of(), body != null ? StringBody.of(body) : null);
083   }
084
085   /**
086    * Constructor with headers and an optional body.
087    *
088    * @param statusLine The status line. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
089    * @param headers The response headers. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
090    * @param body The response body. May be <jk>null</jk>.
091    */
092   public BasicHttpResponse(HttpStatusLine statusLine, List<HttpHeader> headers, HttpBody body) {
093      this.statusLine = assertArgNotNull("statusLine", statusLine);
094      this.headers = HttpHeaderList.of(headers);
095      this.body = body;
096   }
097
098   /**
099    * Copy constructor.
100    *
101    * @param copyFrom The instance to copy. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
102    */
103   protected BasicHttpResponse(BasicHttpResponse copyFrom) {
104      this.statusLine = copyFrom.statusLine;
105      this.headers = copyFrom.headers.copy();
106      this.body = copyFrom.body;
107      this.locale = copyFrom.locale;
108   }
109
110   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
111   // Read accessors
112   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
113
114   @Override /* HttpResponseMessage */
115   public HttpStatusLine getStatusLine() {
116      return statusLine;
117   }
118
119   @Override /* HttpResponseMessage */
120   public List<HttpHeader> getHeaders() {
121      return Collections.unmodifiableList(headers);
122   }
123
124   @Override /* HttpResponseMessage */
125   public HttpBody getBody() {
126      return body;
127   }
128
129   /**
130    * Returns the HTTP status code from the status line.
131    *
132    * @return The status code.
133    */
134   public int getStatusCode() {
135      return statusLine.getStatusCode();
136   }
137
138   /**
139    * Returns the locale associated with this response, if any.
140    *
141    * @return The locale, possibly <jk>null</jk>.
142    */
143   public Locale getLocale() {
144      return locale;
145   }
146
147   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
148   // Fluent setters (mutate this instance)
149   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
150
151   /**
152    * Sets the status line.
153    *
154    * @param value New status line. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
155    * @return This object.
156    */
157   public BasicHttpResponse setStatusLine(HttpStatusLine value) {
158      assertModifiable();
159      this.statusLine = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
160      return this;
161   }
162
163   /**
164    * Sets the status code, preserving the existing protocol version and reason phrase.
165    *
166    * @param value New status code.
167    * @return This object.
168    */
169   public BasicHttpResponse setStatusCode(int value) {
170      assertModifiable();
171      this.statusLine = HttpStatusLineBean.of(statusLine.getProtocolVersion(), value, statusLine.getReasonPhrase());
172      return this;
173   }
174
175   /**
176    * Sets the reason phrase, preserving the existing protocol version and status code.
177    *
178    * @param value New reason phrase. May be <jk>null</jk>.
179    * @return This object.
180    */
181   public BasicHttpResponse setReasonPhrase(String value) {
182      assertModifiable();
183      this.statusLine = HttpStatusLineBean.of(statusLine.getProtocolVersion(), statusLine.getStatusCode(), value);
184      return this;
185   }
186
187   /**
188    * Sets the protocol version, preserving the existing status code and reason phrase.
189    *
190    * @param value New protocol version. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
191    * @return This object.
192    */
193   public BasicHttpResponse setProtocolVersion(HttpProtocolVersion value) {
194      assertModifiable();
195      assertArgNotNull("value", value);
196      this.statusLine = HttpStatusLineBean.of(value, statusLine.getStatusCode(), statusLine.getReasonPhrase());
197      return this;
198   }
199
200   /**
201    * Replaces all headers with the given list.
202    *
203    * @param values New headers. {@code null} is treated as an empty list.
204    * @return This object.
205    */
206   public BasicHttpResponse setHeaders(List<HttpHeader> values) {
207      assertModifiable();
208      this.headers.clear();
209      if (values != null)
210         this.headers.append(values);
211      return this;
212   }
213
214   /**
215    * Replaces all headers with the given array.
216    *
217    * @param values New headers. {@code null} is treated as an empty array.
218    * @return This object.
219    */
220   public BasicHttpResponse setHeaders(HttpHeader...values) {
221      assertModifiable();
222      this.headers.clear();
223      if (values != null)
224         this.headers.append(values);
225      return this;
226   }
227
228   /**
229    * Sets a single header, replacing any existing header with the same name.
230    *
231    * @param value The header to set. {@code null} is ignored.
232    * @return This object.
233    */
234   public BasicHttpResponse setHeader(HttpHeader value) {
235      assertModifiable();
236      this.headers.set(value);
237      return this;
238   }
239
240   /**
241    * Sets a single header, replacing any existing header with the same name.
242    *
243    * @param name Header name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
244    * @param value Header value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
245    * @return This object.
246    */
247   public BasicHttpResponse setHeader(String name, String value) {
248      assertModifiable();
249      this.headers.set(name, value);
250      return this;
251   }
252
253   /**
254    * Appends a header to the end of the header list.
255    *
256    * @param value The header to add. {@code null} is ignored.
257    * @return This object.
258    */
259   public BasicHttpResponse addHeader(HttpHeader value) {
260      assertModifiable();
261      this.headers.append(value);
262      return this;
263   }
264
265   /**
266    * Appends a header to the end of the header list.
267    *
268    * @param name Header name.
269    * @param value Header value.
270    * @return This object.
271    */
272   public BasicHttpResponse addHeader(String name, String value) {
273      assertModifiable();
274      this.headers.append(name, value);
275      return this;
276   }
277
278   /**
279    * Sets the response body.
280    *
281    * @param value New body. May be <jk>null</jk>.
282    * @return This object.
283    */
284   public BasicHttpResponse setBody(HttpBody value) {
285      assertModifiable();
286      this.body = value;
287      return this;
288   }
289
290   /**
291    * Sets the response body to a plain-text string body (UTF-8, {@code text/plain}).
292    *
293    * @param value Body text. May be <jk>null</jk>.
294    * @return This object.
295    */
296   public BasicHttpResponse setContent(String value) {
297      return setBody(value != null ? StringBody.of(value) : null);
298   }
299
300   /**
301    * Sets the response body.
302    *
303    * @param value New body. May be <jk>null</jk>.
304    * @return This object.
305    */
306   public BasicHttpResponse setContent(HttpBody value) {
307      return setBody(value);
308   }
309
310   /**
311    * Sets the locale associated with this response.
312    *
313    * @param value New locale. May be <jk>null</jk>.
314    * @return This object.
315    */
316   public BasicHttpResponse setLocale(Locale value) {
317      assertModifiable();
318      this.locale = value;
319      return this;
320   }
321
322   /**
323    * Sets the value of the {@code Location} header.
324    *
325    * @param value The new location value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
326    * @return This object.
327    */
328   public BasicHttpResponse setLocation(String value) {
329      return setHeader(Location.NAME, value);
330   }
331
332   /**
333    * Sets the value of the {@code Location} header.
334    *
335    * @param value The new location value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
336    * @return This object.
337    */
338   public BasicHttpResponse setLocation(URI value) {
339      return setHeader(Location.NAME, value != null ? value.toString() : null);
340   }
341
342   /**
343    * Latches this instance so that subsequent calls to mutating setters throw {@link IllegalStateException}.
344    *
345    * @return This object.
346    */
347   public BasicHttpResponse setUnmodifiable() {
348      this.unmodifiable = true;
349      return this;
350   }
351
352   /**
353    * Returns whether this instance is locked against modification.
354    *
355    * @return {@code true} if {@link #setUnmodifiable()} has been called.
356    */
357   public boolean isUnmodifiable() {
358      return unmodifiable;
359   }
360
361   /**
362    * Throws an {@link IllegalStateException} if this instance has been marked unmodifiable.
363    */
364   protected final void assertModifiable() {
365      if (unmodifiable)
366         throw new IllegalStateException("Instance is unmodifiable");
367   }
368
369   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
370   // Immutable "with" helpers (return new instances; preserved for callers that prefer immutability)
371   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
372
373   /**
374    * Returns a new instance with the given body replacing the current body.
375    *
376    * @param value The new body. May be <jk>null</jk>.
377    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
378    */
379   public BasicHttpResponse withBody(HttpBody value) {
380      var c = new BasicHttpResponse(this);
381      c.body = value;
382      return c;
383   }
384
385   /**
386    * Returns a new instance with the given string body replacing the current body.
387    *
388    * @param value The new body as a plain-text string. May be <jk>null</jk>.
389    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
390    */
391   public BasicHttpResponse withBody(String value) {
392      return withBody(value != null ? StringBody.of(value) : null);
393   }
394
395   /**
396    * Returns a new instance with the given header added.
397    *
398    * @param header The header to add. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
399    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
400    */
401   public BasicHttpResponse withHeader(HttpHeader header) {
402      var c = new BasicHttpResponse(this);
403      c.headers.append(header);
404      return c;
405   }
406
407   /**
408    * Returns a new instance with the given header name and value added.
409    *
410    * @param name The header name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
411    * @param value The header value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
412    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
413    */
414   public BasicHttpResponse withHeader(String name, String value) {
415      return withHeader(HttpHeaderBean.of(name, value));
416   }
417
418   @Override /* Object */
419   public String toString() {
420      return statusLine.toString();
421   }
422}
